title: taraxacum udum
intro: Taraxacum udum, also known as the common dandelion or lion's tooth, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum udum include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, among others. Taraxacum udum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal supplements to promote overall well-being.
